headline: Georgia Power begins construction of newest battery storage system in Wadley, Ga.
summary: Georgia Power recently started construction on a new 260 megawatt (MW) battery energy storage system (BESS) in Jefferson County, Ga. just outside of the City of Wadley. The project, approved by the Georgia Public Service Commission (PSC), is located beside the existing third-party owned Wadley solar facility and near existing transmission infrastructure. The new Wadley BESS is a company-owned asset that strengthens the grid and the area's growing renewable energy resources.

Chairman Mitchell McGraw, Jefferson County Board of Commissioners; Dwayne Flowers, City of Wadley Administrator; Mayor Pro Tem John “Tubby” Maye, Wadley City Council; Commissioner Rodney McKinnie, Jefferson County Board of Commissioners; Mayor Harold Moore, City of Wadley; Councilman James Cunningham Jr., Wadley City Council; Commissioner William Toulson, Jefferson County Board of Commissioners; Jerry Coalson, Jefferson County Administrator; Kerry Bridges, Georgia Power Region Executive

headline: VST Stock: Valuation and Other Factors That Could Move Shares
summary: Vistra trades below peers despite stronger earnings visibility, with hedging and contracts shaping valuation as investors weigh 2026 guidance and long-term growth.

content.title: VST Stock: Valuation and Other Factors That Could Move Shares
